meta.title: PAR Industries
meta.description: PAR Industries — leading industrial fasteners manufacturer and supplier in Ludhiana, Punjab, India. Bolts, nuts, washers, rivets, screws, studs and anchors since 2009.
meta.description.products: Commercial and precision fastener dimensions, grades and PAR standard specifications from PAR Industries, Ludhiana, India.
meta.description.customers: Industries served by PAR Industries — agriculture, automotive, construction, oil and gas, solar and more.
meta.keywords: fasteners, bolts, nuts, washers, industrial fasteners, Ludhiana, India, PAR Industries
brand.name: PAR Industries
hero.slide1.title: Welcome to PAR Industries
hero.slide1.subtitle: The leading fasteners manufacturers in India!
hero.slide2.title: Fasteners designed using high grade materials in accordance with current international specifications.
hero.slide3.title: Including both hot and cold forging manufacturing facilities.
hero.slide4.title: Infallible commitment to product quality control.
about.title: About Us
about.intro: PAR Industries is a renowned manufacturer and supplier of industrial fasteners, serving the industry with world class quality bolts and nuts since 2009, located in Ludhiana, Punjab, India.
about.p1: Our company code is one of the measured strategic management, a desire to fulfill client's need, a nexus of skilled workmanship and an infallible commitment to product quality control.
about.p2: PAR Industries pride itself in having strong work ethos, geared towards constant quality improvement system and meeting strict delivery schedule.
about.p3: Given the achievement in the industry, our offered products find its achievements in agriculture, automobile, pumps industry and many more sectors as well.
services.title: Services
services.cold.title: Cold Forging
services.cold.p1: PAR Industries has in house cold forging machines which are appreciated for product's high tensile strength and long lasting life.
services.cold.p2: These machines help us to make different types of fasteners in different sizes and shapes as per standard and also customer oriented.
services.hot.title: Hot Forging
services.hot.p1: PAR Industries has in house manufacturing setup for hot forging bigger diameter bolts and nuts.
services.hot.p2: From standard hex bolts to fully customized special shaped heads. We have the ability to forge thousands of sizes and shapes with outstanding precision, dimensional accuracy, corrosion resistance and durable standards.
services.trop.title: Trop Facilities
services.trop.p1: PAR Industries has Trop machines which enables us to make varieties of bar nuts from the range of 5/16, 3/8, 1/2, 5/8, 3/4, 7/16, 1 and 1.1/4.
services.trop.p2: These bar nuts are used in many sectors. Trop machines enable us to make bar nuts as per customer drawings and specification as well.
quality.title: Quality Policies
quality.step1.title: Incoming of Raw Materials
quality.step1.text: Purchase raw materials with test certificate for checking properties like chemical composition and mechanical properties.
quality.step2.title: Production Process
quality.step2.l1: - Stage wise inspection at specific frequency.
quality.step2.l3: - First 5 pieces are checked and are approved by supervisor.
quality.step3.title: Technical inspection
quality.step3.text: Temperature of furnace are regularly checked with electronic heat recorder.
quality.step4.title: Finishing
quality.step4.text: Quality and thickness is checked by technical staff at specific frequency.
quality.step5.title: Final stage
quality.step5.text: Packaging of each items are labelled and mentioned with specific Size, PO. No., Total weight and no. of pieces per packet.
